B

backToMainMenu() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints a message if the program is going back to the main menu
backToSearchInventory() - Method in class mru.store.view.AppMenu
This method prints a message if the program is going back to the search inventory menu
boardGameDesigners - Variable in class mru.store.model.BoardGames
 
BoardGames - Class in mru.store.model
This class represents the toy type board games and extends from the toy class.
BoardGames(String, String, String, double, int, int, int, int, String) - Constructor for class mru.store.model.BoardGames
This method initializes the general attributes of toy and board game specific attributes.
